Lucy Desktop

Phase 7: Release Readiness + Hardware Reliability + Compliance UX

发布准备 · 真实硬件稳定性 · 合规体验

v0.7.0 · 2026-07-14
159
Rust Tests
0
TS Errors
1000
i18n Keys
447KB
Bundle (130KB gzip)
S1: Hardware Reliability ✓ S2: Audit + Diagnostics ✓ S3: Release Engineering ✓ S4: UX Hardening ✓

S1 Hardware Reliability · 硬件可靠性

Rust: reliability.rs (750+ lines)

  • with_timeout — 命令超时包装 (10s)
  • with_retry — 指数退避重试
  • with_timeout_retry — 组合超时+重试
  • HeartbeatMonitor — 心跳监控 (missed threshold)
  • ReconnectPolicy — 重连策略 (5 attempts, backoff)
  • CommandTracker — 命令统计 (success/fail/timeout)
  • DiagnosticsPackage — 7 sub-structures 诊断包
  • device_behavior_diffs() — 10 条虚拟/真实设备差异

Frontend: deviceStore.ts

  • invokeWithTimeout — 10s 超时包装
  • 自动重连 (5 attempts, 1s→2s→4s→8s→16s)
  • 重连失败降级为虚拟设备
  • reconnectInProgress 防止手动断连触发重连
  • Mock handlers: 10 条行为差异 + 统计 + 诊断包

S2 Audit + Diagnostics · 审计与诊断

AuditCenterModule.tsx (400+ lines)

  • 三维筛选: 模块 (7) × 风险 (4) × 时间 (4)
  • 实时搜索
  • 统计面板 (按风险 + 按模块)
  • 详情面板 (AI 审批链路可追溯)
  • 导出脱敏 JSON
  • 空状态 / 加载态 / 错误态

Diagnostics Export

  • cmd_export_diagnostics — 一键导出诊断包
  • 7 sub-structures: AppInfo, DeviceInfo, CommandStats, ProtocolStats, SecurityInfo, ConfigSummary, RecentErrors
  • Dashboard 诊断按钮调用真实命令
  • 隐私脱敏 (API Key/密码自动移除)

S3 Release Engineering · 发布工程

Rust: release.rs (660+ lines)

  • AppVersion — 编译时嵌入版本信息
  • check_for_updates() — HTTP manifest 版本对比
  • compare_versions() — 语义化版本比较
  • get_changelog() — 内嵌 4 版本 changelog
  • init_crash_logger() — ~/.lucy/logs/ 日志初始化
  • log_error() — 错误写入日志文件
  • read_recent_logs() — 读取最近日志
  • get_release_checklist() — 14 项发布检查清单

7 tests 7 Tauri commands

Frontend: ChangelogModule.tsx (450+ lines)

  • 版本信息面板 (version + build info grid)
  • 更新检查 (HTTP 请求 + 版本对比 UI)
  • 版本历史 (4 版本, 分类显示 new/fix/improve)
  • 崩溃日志面板 (时间/级别/消息 + 清空)
  • 发布检查清单 (14 项, ready/not-ready 状态)

8-bit pixel UI i18n 48 keys

tauri.conf.json · 构建配置

macOS DMG · min 10.15
Windows NSIS · perMachine · en-US/zh-CN
Linux AppImage + deb
"bundle": { "targets": ["dmg", "nsis", "appimage", "deb"] } "plugins": { "updater": { "endpoints": ["https://releases.lucy.dev/latest.json"] } }

S4 UX Hardening · 体验加固

TaskFlow 错误恢复

  • errorStep() — 标记当前步骤为错误
  • retryStep() — 重试错误步骤
  • resumeFlow() — 跳过错误继续
  • TaskStepper: 错误消息 + Retry/Resume 按钮

模式系统 + 健康评分

  • AppMode: beginner / standard / developer / education / demo
  • Dashboard 健康评分 (0-100, 5 级颜色)
  • Virtual Lab 进度持久化 (localStorage)
  • i18n: +33 keys (modes 17 + health 16)

CMD Tauri Commands · 命令注册

ModuleCommandsCount
devicescan, connect, disconnect, get_info, refresh_info, nfc_*, subghz_*, gpio_*, ir_*, badusb_*, screen_*, ai_*, config_*, firmware_*, storage_*, log_*, policy_*, device_health48
databasecmd_nfc_*, cmd_subghz_*, cmd_ir_*, cmd_badusb_*, cmd_audit_*, cmd_ai_conv_*, cmd_firmware_history_*, cmd_asset_stats, cmd_timeline_*19
gatewaycmd_gateway_classify, cmd_gateway_check, cmd_gateway_audit_write3
reliabilitycmd_device_behavior_diffs, cmd_command_stats, cmd_command_stats_reset, cmd_export_diagnostics4
release (NEW)cmd_get_app_version, cmd_check_for_updates, cmd_get_changelog, cmd_get_crash_logs, cmd_clear_crash_logs, cmd_log_error, cmd_get_release_checklist7
Total81

FILES 源文件清单

Frontend (44 files)

  • App.tsx — 14 views routing
  • Dashboard.tsx — 健康评分 + 9 quick actions
  • stores/ — deviceStore, uiStore, chatStore, taskStore
  • modules/ — Nfc, SubGHz, Ir, BadUsb, Gpio, ScreenMirror, Firmware, Settings, Library, VirtualLab, AuditCenter, Changelog (NEW)
  • lib/tauri.ts — 81 mock handlers
  • locales/ — zh-CN.json + en-US.json (1000 keys × 2)

Rust (36 files)

  • lib.rs — 入口 + 81 命令注册
  • database.rs — 11 tables, WAL mode
  • gateway.rs — 5-stage security pipeline
  • reliability.rs — timeout/retry/heartbeat/reconnect
  • release.rs (NEW) — version/update/changelog/crash-log/checklist
  • device/ — transport, detector, commands, virtual
  • security/ — badusb_guard, ai_sanitizer, region, policy

Rust: 159 tests passed, 0 failed
Vite build: 447.36 KB / 130.74 KB gzip
i18n: 1000 keys, 41 sections, parity PASS
JSON valid (both locale files)
Source files: 44 TS/TSX + 36 Rust
tauri.conf.json valid
New files exist (release.rs + ChangelogModule.tsx)
7 new Tauri commands registered
Version bumped: 0.1.0 → 0.7.0

CHECK Release Checklist · 发布检查清单

ItemCategoryRequiredStatus

Rust tests all passCode QualityYESDONE
i18n zh-CN/en-US parityCode QualityYESDONE
Vite build successBuildYESDONE
macOS DMG buildPackagingYESPENDING
Windows NSIS installerPackagingYESPENDING
Linux AppImagePackagingYESPENDING
Code signingSigningYESPENDING
Crash/error logging verifiedReliabilityYESDONE
Security audit (Gateway + BadUSB + Region)SecurityYESDONE
Privacy desensitization (7 patterns)SecurityYESDONE
Release notes writtenDocumentationYESDONE
In-app changelog pageDocumentationYESDONE

⚠ Packaging & Signing 项需要真实构建环境 (签名证书 + 目标平台) 才能完成

NEXT 下一步

P7 已完成全部 4 个 Sprint。 Lucy Desktop 从"实验室产品"升级为"可发布产品雏形"。

发布前仍需人工完成:

  • macOS DMG 构建 + 公证 (需要 Apple Developer 证书)
  • Windows NSIS 构建 + 代码签名 (需要 EV 证书)
  • Linux AppImage 构建 (在 Linux 环境或 CI 中执行)
  • 更新服务器 manifest 部署 (releases.lucy.dev/latest.json)
  • 真实硬件回归测试 (NFC/SubGHz/IR/BadUSB/GPIO)

可能的 P8 方向:

  • 真实硬件闭环测试 (自动化 smoke tests)
  • 性能优化 (大量资产下搜索/渲染)
  • 插件系统 (第三方扩展)
  • 社区脚本市场

Lucy Desktop v0.7.0 · Phase 7 Complete · 2026-07-14

159 Rust tests · 0 TS errors · 1000 i18n keys · 447KB bundle
